narrative:
Thorn Township has 3,246 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
